title: Gabbay #1373
definition:
Gabbai = "my back"

 1) the head of an important Benjamite family living in Jerusalem in
    the time of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gabbai = "my back"

 1) the head of an important Benjamite family living in Jerusalem in
    the time of Nehemiah

    NASB:  a Benjamite
